_incomplete: Converted from DUNGEON_FINALE.tmj. Sewer tileset pack (craftpix-net-913553) now added to public/assets/mapsrc/sewer/ -- all 15 tileset images verified against their declared columns/tilecount, all matched (no crop bug this time, these were embedded declarations not external .tsx references). Collision was built by rasterizing the source's hand-drawn 'DO NOT WALK' polygon objects onto the tile grid, unioned with the Walls/Walls2/Walls3 tile layers -- this is a different method than area2/area3/area6 used and is the least-verified part of the conversion; worth a specific look in a live playthrough. The lever->grate mechanic mirrors area3's door exactly (Door_water = closed layer, Door_arc = open layer, swapped via gid-animation + gatedCells + barrier, same 120/1 timing). Spawn (24,16) is inferred from the source's ENTRANCE marker, adjusted onto the nearest tile actually connected to the room in this collision model -- the marker's literal tile (25,16) sits on a wall cap, and a nearby 2x2 pocket at (26-27,16-17) that looked like a doorway turned out to be disconnected from the rest of the room. Worth checking against Area 6's actual arrival point once walked. Exit zone_exit currently targets 'outside_sewer' (see that map) with target coordinates matching its PLAYER SPAWNS. Not walked in-browser.
